objective: C3B-PR1 creates the public-safe Checkpoint 3B consent/provenance planning gate only. Positive claims: C3B-PR1-LEDGER-001 reconciles the repository ledger for PR #273 merged at 0f737c564f9245b66640988573ac04f4432e06d5 and issue #269 closed while keeping issue #249 open as the public Checkpoint 3 tracker; C3B-PR1-C3A-001 records that the currently listed Checkpoint 3A executable acceptance probe set is complete through CP1-CP8 without expanding that evidence into Checkpoint 3B, Checkpoint 3C, hosted/public demo, provider setup, cloned identity, real media, public distribution, or production readiness; C3B-PR1-BOUNDARY-001 defines Checkpoint 3B only as consent/provenance planning, acceptance contracts, risk boundaries, and future issue sequencing; C3B-PR1-GUARDRAIL-001 adds issue-specific branch/file allowlist and regression coverage that rejects near-match branches and unauthorized changed files. This PR must remain public-safe and must not expose private strategy, provider choices, reviewer strategy, invite codes, private media, real personal data, provider payloads, provider outputs, secrets, tokens, or credentials.
